addAch.description: Records an ACH account into the system

params.description: An array of ACH account info including:

fields.description: The contact ID tied to this account
fields.name: contact_id

fields.description: The first name on the account
fields.name: first_name

fields.description: The last name on the account
fields.name: last_name

fields.description: The address line 1 on the account (optional)
fields.name: address1

fields.description: The address line 2 on the account (optional)
fields.name: address2

fields.description: The city on the account (optional)
fields.name: city

fields.description: The ISO 3166-2 subdivision code on the account (optional)
fields.name: state

fields.description: The zip code on the account (optional)
fields.name: zip

fields.description: The ISO 3166-1 2-character country code (optional, defaults to 'US')
fields.name: country

fields.description: The account number (will be encrypted) (optional)
fields.name: account

fields.description: The routing number (will be encrypted) (optional)
fields.name: routing

fields.description: The last 4 digits of the account number (will be encrypted) (optional if account is given)
fields.name: last4

fields.description: The type of account, 'checking' or 'savings', (optional, defaults to 'checking')
fields.name: type

fields.description: The reference ID attached to this account given by the payment processor (optional)
fields.name: reference_id

fields.description: The reference ID for the client this payment account belongs to (optional)
fields.name: client_reference_id

fields.description: The currency in which is denominated the account (optional)
fields.name: currency

params.name: vars

addAch.return_description: The ACH account ID for the record just added, void if not added

addCc.description: Records a CC account into the system

params.description: An array of CC account info including:

fields.description: The contact ID tied to this account
fields.name: contact_id

fields.description: The first name on the account

fields.name: currency

params.name: card_number

The card type detected, null if the card is invalid or is

deleteAch.description:
Removes an ACH account record using the given account ID. Attempts to remove
the payment account from the remote gateway (if stored off-site). Deletes sensitive
information and marks the record as inactive.

params.description: The account ID for this ACH account
params.name: account_id

params.description:
True to perform a soft delete, or false to permanently
delete the record (optional, default true)
params.name: soft_delete

deleteCc.description:
Removes a CC account record using the givent account ID. Attempts to remove
the payment account from the remote gateway (if stored off-site). Deletes sensitive
information and marks the record as inactive.

params.description: The account ID for this ACH account
params.name: account_id

params.description:
True to perform a soft delete, or false to permanently
delete the record (optional, default true)
params.name: soft_delete

add.description: Creates a new coupon

params.description: An array of coupon information including:

fields.description: The coupon code
fields.name: code

fields.description: The company ID this coupon belongs to
fields.name: company_id

fields.description: The number of times this coupon has been used (optional, default 0)
fields.name: used_qty

fields.description: The maximum number of times this coupon can be used (optional, default 0 for unlimited)
fields.name: max_qty

fields.description: The date this coupon goes into effect (optional)
fields.name: start_date

fields.description: The date this coupon is no longer effective (optional)
fields.name: end_date

fields.description: The status of the coupon, 'active' or 'inactive' (optional, default 'active')
fields.name: status

fields.description:
Allows the coupon to be applied every time the service
renews, restrictions on start_date/end_date/used_qty/max_qty
do not apply. If the coupon was applied originally, it will
continue to be applied so long as status is 'active' and the
package is still tied to this coupon.
fields.name: recurring

fields.description:
Allows the coupon to be used again every time a
renewing service that uses it renews (1 to increase the used
quantity each time a renewing service renews, 0 for renewing
services to use this coupon only once. optional, default 0)
fields.name: limit_recurring

fields.description: A numerically indexed array containing package IDs this coupon applies to:
fields.name: packages

fields.description:
An array of discounts for this coupon containing (only one per currency):currency The ISO 4217 currency codeamount The amount of the discounttype The type of discount 'amount' a currency amount,
'percent' a percentage (optional, default 'percent')
fields.name: amounts

setPassphrase.description:
Sets the new passphrase used to encrypt/decrypt the private key. When a
blank private_key_passphrase is used the Blesta.system_key is used to
encrypt the private key, allowing the system to decrypt it at will. However,
if a private_key_passphrase is set that value is instead used to encrypt
the private key and therefore only that key (which Blesta does not store)
can be used to decrypt the private key.

params.description: An array of passphrase info including:

fields.description: The current passphrase in use (leave blank if no passphrase currently set)
fields.name: current_passphrase

fields.description: The new password to use
fields.name: private_key_passphrase

fields.description: The new password again, to confirm (optional)
fields.name: confirm_new_passphrase

fields.description:
Set to some non-empty value (e.g. "yes") if the user
understands the ramifications of setting a passphrase
fields.name: agree

params.name: vars

params.description: Set to true to require that user has saved the passphrase to a safe location
params.name: require_agree

setPassphrase.signature: public setPassphrase(array<string|int, mixed> $vars[, bool $require_agree = false ]) : mixed

add.description: Adds a package option for the given company

params.description: An array of package option info including:

fields.description: The ID of the company to assign the option to
fields.name: company_id

fields.description: The label displayed for this option
fields.name: label

fields.description: The field name for this option
fields.name: name

fields.description: The field type for this option, one of:selectcheckboxradioquantitytexttextareapassword
fields.name: type

fields.description: 1 if the option is addable by a client
fields.name: addable

fields.description: 1 if the option is editable by a client
fields.name: editable

fields.description: 1 if the option is hidden
fields.name: hidden

fields.description:
A numerically indexed array of value info including:name The name of the package option value (display name)value The value of the package option (optional, default null)default 1 or 0, whether or not this value is the default value (optional, default 0)
Only one value may be set as the default value for the option
For options of the 'quantity' type, the default may be set to the quantitystatus The status of the package option value (optional, default 'active')
Only 'select' and 'radio' option types may be 'inactive'min The minimum value if type is 'quantity'max The maximum value if type is 'quantity', null for unlimited quantitystep The step value if type is 'quantity'pricing A numerically indexed array of pricing info including:term The term as an integer 1-65535 (optional, default 1)period The period, 'day', 'week', 'month', 'year', 'onetime' (optional, default 'month')price The price of this term (optional, default 0.00)setup_fee The setup fee for this package (optional, default 0.00)currency The ISO 4217 currency code for this pricing (optional, default USD)
fields.name: values

fields.description: An array of package option group IDs that the option belongs to (optional)
fields.name: groups

params.name: vars

add.return_description: The package option ID, void on error

delete.description: Permanently removes a package option from the system

params.description: The package option ID to delete
params.name: option_id

deleteOptionValues.description: Deletes all package option values and associated pricing for the given package option

params.description: The ID of the package option whose values and pricing to delete
params.name: option_id

params.description: The ID of the package option value whose value and pricing to delete (optional)
params.name: value_id

params.description: The ID of the package option to update
params.name: option_id

params.description: An array of package option info including:

fields.description: The label displayed for this option
fields.name: label

fields.description: The field name for this option
fields.name: name

fields.description: The field type for this option, one of:selectcheckboxradioquantitytexttextareapassword
fields.name: type

fields.description: 1 if the option is addable by a client
fields.name: addable

fields.description: 1 if the option is editable by a client
fields.name: editable

fields.description: 1 if the option is hidden
fields.name: hidden

fields.description:
A numerically indexed array of value info including:id The ID of the package option value to update. If the ID is
not given, the option value will be added. (optional, required for edit)name The name of the package option value (display name).
If the 'name' is empty or not given, the option value will be deletedvalue The value of the package option (optional, default null)default 1 or 0, whether or not this value is the default value (optional, default 0)
Only one value may be set as the default value for the option.
For options of the 'quantity' type, the default may be set to the quantitystatus The status of the package option value (optional, default 'active')
Only 'select' and 'radio' option types may be 'inactive'min The minimum value if type is 'quantity'max The maximum value if type is 'quantity', null for unlimited quantitystep The step value if type is 'quantity'pricing A numerically indexed array of pricing info including:id The package option pricing ID to update. If the ID is
not given, the pricing will be added. (optional, required for edit)term The term as an integer 1-65535 (optional, default 1).
If the term is not given along with an ID, the pricing will be deletedperiod The period, 'day', 'week', 'month', 'year', 'onetime' (optional, default 'month')price The price of this term (optional, default 0.00)setup_fee The setup fee for this package (optional, default 0.00)currency The ISO 4217 currency code for this pricing (optional, default USD)
fields.name: values

fields.description: An array of package option group IDs that the option belongs to (optional)
fields.name: groups

params.name: vars

edit.return_description: The package option ID, void on error

Whether or not services derived from this package

Whether this card appears on client profiles by default
(1 to enable, 0 to disable) (optional, default 1)
